leagueBriefing: Tournament madness is in full swing as top seeds survived scares and underdogs punched tickets. Duke and Clemson survived nail-biters in the ACC, while UMass pulled off a major upset in the MAC. Meanwhile, big names like UConn, Arizona, and Houston took care of business to keep their championship hopes alive.

games.headline: Duke narrowly avoids disaster as Florida State buzzer beater rims out
games.brief: The top-ranked Blue Devils nearly saw their tournament run end before it truly started, escaping with a one-point victory over a resilient Florida State squad. Duke relied on a massive second-half run to overcome an eight-point deficit, but they had to hold their collective breath as the Seminoles' final attempt at an upset skipped off the rim at the horn.
bullets: Isaiah Evans carried the offensive load for Duke with a career-high 32 points, including seven triples.
ACC Player of the Year Cameron Boozer finished with 23 points and 10 rebounds.
Florida State's Robert McCray V scored 25 points but missed the potential winning 3-pointer as time expired.
Duke dominated the glass with a 46-25 rebounding advantage.
The Blue Devils played without starting point guard Caleb Foster (foot).
games.context: Duke extends its winning streak to nine games and advances to the ACC semifinals.

games.headline: Arizona overpowers UCF to cruise into Big 12 semifinals
games.brief: Arizona left little doubt in their Big 12 tournament opener, using a dominant first half to distance themselves from UCF early. The Wildcats' depth and size proved too much for the Knights, who couldn't find a rhythm offensively against one of the nation's most efficient scoring units.
bullets: Arizona built a 16-point lead by halftime and never looked back.
The Wildcats' defense held UCF to just 59 points, well below their season average.
Arizona moves to 30-2 on the season, further solidifying their case for a No. 1 seed.
The win sets up a high-stakes semifinal matchup for the Wildcats.
games.context: Arizona reaches the 30-win mark for the season while advancing in the Big 12 tournament.

highlights.title: Big 12 Tournament: UCF Knights vs. Arizona Wildcats | Full Game Highlights | ESPN College Basketball

games.headline: Houston defense survives Dybantsa's record-breaking night
games.brief: In a physical Big 12 quarterfinal, Houston's trademark defense did just enough to withstand a historic performance from BYU's AJ Dybantsa. While Dybantsa broke the tournament scoring record, the Cougars' collective effort and ability to navigate serious foul trouble in the second half allowed them to pull away late.
bullets: BYU's AJ Dybantsa scored 26 points to set a new Big 12 tournament scoring record (93 points).
Kingston Fleming led Houston with 17 points despite dealing with heavy foul trouble.
Houston trailed 41-37 at the half before limiting BYU to just 25 second-half points.
The Cougars overcame foul trouble for both Fleming and Emanuel Sharp to secure the win.
games.context: Houston advances to face the winner of TCU-Kansas in the Big 12 semifinals.

games.headline: UConn leaves Xavier in the dust with clinical offensive display
games.brief: The defending national champions looked every bit the part in their Big East quarterfinal, dismantling Xavier with a balanced and overwhelming attack. After a somewhat slow finish to the regular season, the Huskies used a 50-point first half to signal they are ready for another deep March run.
bullets: Tarris Reed Jr. dominated the paint with 17 points and 14 rebounds.
UConn shot effectively from all levels, racking up 50 points by the halftime break.
The Huskies' defense limited Xavier to just 30 points in the opening frame.
The 25-point margin of victory is one of UConn's largest in the Big East tournament.
games.context: No. 6 UConn advances to the Big East semifinals at Madison Square Garden.

games.headline: Cyclones use second-half surge to blow past Texas Tech
games.brief: What began as a back-and-forth defensive struggle turned into an Iowa State rout in the second half. After trailing early, the Cyclones unleashed a 15-0 run that effectively ended the Red Raiders' tournament hopes, highlighted by a masterclass in physicality and points off turnovers.
bullets: Tamin Lipsey led the way for Iowa State with 20 points and four assists.
Joshua Jefferson posted a double-double with 18 points and 13 rebounds.
Iowa State outscored Texas Tech 42-18 in the paint.
Texas Tech was held to just 20 points in the second half after leading by as many as 12 in the first.
games.context: Iowa State advances to the Big 12 semifinals with their 27th win of the season.

highlights.title: Iowa State vs. Texas Tech | Big 12 Tournament Quarterfinal Highlights | ESPN College Basketball

games.headline: Clemson holds off furious North Carolina rally in ACC thriller
games.brief: Clemson appeared to have the game in hand with an 18-point lead midway through the second half, but they had to survive a frantic North Carolina comeback to advance. The Tar Heels clawed all the way back to within a single point, but the Tigers' early physicality proved to be the difference in a game that went down to the wire.
bullets: UNC's Henri Veesaar had a monster night with career highs in points (28) and rebounds (17).
Six different Clemson players scored in double figures, led by Nick Davidson's 17 points.
Clemson led by as many as 18 points (61-43) before the Tar Heels' late charge.
The Tigers' defense forced Carolina into a late-game struggle before the rally began.
games.context: Clemson pulls off the upset over No. 19 UNC to reach the ACC semifinals.

games.headline: UMass stuns top-seeded Miami (OH) in MAC quarterfinal shocker
games.brief: In the biggest upset of the day, UMass knocked off a Miami (OH) team that had lost only once all season. The Minutemen found their offensive groove at the perfect time, out-dueling the RedHawks in a high-scoring affair that sends the tournament's heavy favorite home much earlier than expected.
bullets: UMass scored 50 points in the second half to secure the upset.
Miami (OH) entered the game with a nearly perfect 31-1 record.
The Minutemen's backcourt combined for key buckets in the final minutes to ice the game.
This loss likely forces Miami (OH) to hope for an at-large bid after a dominant regular season.
games.context: UMass advances to the MAC semifinals while ending Miami (OH)'s 18-game winning streak.

games.headline: Miami avenges regular season finale loss by ousting Louisville
games.brief: Just five days after losing to Louisville, Miami got its revenge on the big stage of the ACC tournament. Malik Reneau took over in the second half, scoring nearly all of his points after the break to lead the Hurricanes past the 24th-ranked Cardinals in a physical, defensive battle.
bullets: Malik Reneau scored 18 of his 24 points in the second half for Miami.
Miami forced 17 points off Louisville turnovers.
Louisville struggled from deep, finishing just 6-of-24 from three-point range.
Tru Washington added 17 points and a crucial late steal to seal the victory.
games.context: Miami advances to the ACC semifinals to face No. 10 Virginia.

highlights.title: Louisville Cardinals vs. Miami Hurricanes | ACC Tournament Quarterfinal Highlights | ESPN CBB

games.headline: Tennessee second-half blitz ends Auburn's tournament hopes
games.brief: Auburn looked primed for an upset after a stellar defensive first half, but Tennessee's offensive aggressiveness proved too much down the stretch. The Volunteers lived at the free-throw line in the second half, wearing down the Tigers and turning a seven-point halftime deficit into a double-digit victory.
bullets: Tennessee attempted 27 free throws in the second half alone.
Auburn's Pettiford scored 16 points in the first half but was held in check late.
The Volunteers used a late run to erase Auburn's lead, which had been as high as 11 points.
Auburn now enters Selection Sunday on the bubble after the loss.
games.context: Tennessee advances in the SEC tournament while Auburn awaits its NCAA tournament fate.

highlights.title: SEC Tournament: Auburn Tigers vs. Tennessee Volunteers | Full Game Highlights | ESPN CBB

games.headline: Ohio State edges Iowa in defensive Big Ten battle
games.brief: In a classic Big Ten slugfest, Ohio State relied on its interior presence to hold off a late Iowa charge. The Buckeyes controlled the pace for most of the second half, but the Hawkeyes stayed within striking distance until the final seconds in a game where every possession felt critical.
bullets: Ohio State outscored Iowa 34-30 in the first half and maintained the lead.
The Buckeyes' defense limited Iowa to 39 second-half points.
Both teams finished with identical conference records (12-8 for OSU, 10-10 for Iowa).
The win marks Ohio State's 21st victory of the season.
games.context: Ohio State advances in the Big Ten Tournament while Iowa's bubble status remains uncertain.

games.headline: Kentucky survives Missouri rally to advance in SEC Tournament
games.brief: Kentucky used a strong first-half cushion to withstand a furious Missouri comeback attempt in Nashville. While the Tigers found their shooting rhythm late, the Wildcats' ability to convert at the free-throw line in the closing minutes secured their spot in the next round.
bullets: Kentucky led 38-29 at halftime before Missouri's 43-point second-half outburst.
The Wildcats improved to 21-12 on the season.
Missouri's loss ends their tournament run after a 20-win regular season.
Kentucky's backcourt controlled the tempo during the critical final four minutes.
games.context: Kentucky advances to face a top seed in the SEC quarterfinals.

games.headline: Toledo escapes Bowling Green in MAC quarterfinal thriller
games.brief: Toledo survived an absolute barnburner in Cleveland, defeating cross-state rival Bowling Green by a single point. In a game that featured multiple lead changes in the final minute, the Rockets' final defensive stand proved to be the difference in an emotional MAC quarterfinal.
bullets: Toledo outscored Bowling Green 40-38 in the second half to secure the win.
The game was tied at 38-all going into the halftime break.
Toledo moves to 11-7 in MAC play with the victory.
Bowling Green's season ends despite a 76-point offensive effort.
games.context: Toledo advances to the MAC semifinals to keep their NCAA tournament hopes alive.

games.headline: St. Bonaventure stifles George Mason to pull off A-10 upset
games.brief: St. Bonaventure turned a 10-point halftime deficit into a signature tournament win by locking down George Mason in the second half. The Bonnies' defense was the story, holding the Patriots to just 23 points after the break and silencing the home-state crowd in Pittsburgh.
bullets: Dasonte Bowen led the charge for the Bonnies with 20 points.
St. Bonaventure trailed 34-24 at the half before outscoring Mason 39-23 in the second.
The Bonnies' defense held George Mason to one of their lowest scoring halves of the season.
George Mason finished with a 23-9 overall record.
games.context: St. Bonaventure advances to the A-10 quarterfinals.

games.headline: Seton Hall dominates second half to oust Creighton
games.brief: Seton Hall used a clinical offensive performance in the second half to pull away from Creighton at Madison Square Garden. The Pirates exploited Creighton's perimeter defense and controlled the glass, turning a competitive first half into a double-digit statement win.
bullets: Adam Clark paced Seton Hall with 16 points and steady playmaking.
The Pirates outscored the Bluejays 39-35 in the second half to extend their lead.
Creighton was held to just 26 points in the first half.
Seton Hall improves to 21-11 on the season.
games.context: Seton Hall advances to the Big East semifinals.

games.headline: Utah State cruises past UNLV in Mountain West showdown
games.brief: Utah State left no doubt in their quarterfinal matchup, using a balanced attack and superior size to overwhelm UNLV. The Aggies led from the jump, never allowing the Runnin' Rebels to get their transition game going in a dominant 20-point victory.
bullets: Utah State built a 37-23 lead by halftime and never looked back.
The Aggies improved their season record to an impressive 26-6.
UNLV struggled offensively, shooting poorly from both the field and the stripe.
Utah State's 43 second-half points put the game out of reach early.
games.context: Utah State strengthens its NCAA tournament seeding with a dominant quarterfinal win.

games.headline: Akron fends off late Buffalo surge to advance
games.brief: Akron survived a scare from Buffalo after nearly blowing a 13-point halftime lead. The Zips' early cushion proved vital as the Bulls' offense woke up in the second half, but Akron's clutch free-throw shooting in the final minute allowed them to escape with the win.
bullets: Akron led 42-29 at the half before Buffalo outscored them 41-31 in the second.
The Zips moved to 27-5 on the season with the victory.
Buffalo's comeback fell just short as a potential tying three-pointer missed at the buzzer.
Akron shot nearly 50% from the floor in the first half.
games.context: Akron advances to the MAC semifinals as a top seed.

highlights.title: Florida Atlantic vs North Texas Highlights

games.headline: Williams leads Duquesne past Rhode Island in A-10 clash
games.brief: Duquesne used a strong first-half defensive performance to set the tone against Rhode Island. Despite a late rally from the Rams, the Dukes stayed composed behind a career night from Alex Williams to secure their advancement in the A-10 tournament.
bullets: Alex Williams powered the Dukes with 22 points off the bench.
Duquesne led 35-28 at halftime.
Rhode Island outscored Duquesne in the second half but couldn't overcome the early deficit.
The victory brings Duquesne to 18-14 overall.
games.context: Duquesne advances to the A-10 quarterfinals.

games.headline: Nevada outlasts Grand Canyon in second-half scoring explosion
games.brief: In a high-octane Mountain West quarterfinal, Nevada used a 50-point second half to stun Grand Canyon. After trailing at the break, the Wolf Pack's backcourt took over, hitting several contested shots late to end the Antelopes' tournament dreams.
bullets: Nevada scored 50 points in the second half after trailing 40-34 at halftime.
The win moves Nevada to 22-11 on the year.
Grand Canyon's 20-win season ends with a narrow four-point defeat.
The game saw 12 lead changes in the second half alone.
games.context: Nevada advances to the Mountain West semifinals.

games.headline: Louisiana Tech stifles Middle Tennessee to reach CUSA semis
games.brief: Louisiana Tech used a dominant first half to coast to a double-digit victory over Middle Tennessee. The Bulldogs' defense forced several key turnovers early, allowing them to build a lead that was never seriously threatened in the second half.
bullets: Louisiana Tech led 39-25 at halftime.
Middle Tennessee outscored the Bulldogs 44-41 in the second half but fell short.
Louisiana Tech improves to 19-13 overall.
The Bulldogs dominated the paint, outscoring the Blue Raiders 32-18 inside.
games.context: Louisiana Tech advances to the Conference USA semifinals.

games.headline: Ole Miss mounts massive comeback to stun Georgia
games.brief: In one of the most improbable results of the day, Ole Miss erased a huge early deficit to knock off Georgia. After being outscored 52-42 in the second half, the Rebels' early 14-point cushion in the first half proved to be just enough to survive a late Georgia barrage.
bullets: Ole Miss held a 34-20 halftime lead.
Georgia exploded for 52 second-half points but couldn't quite complete the comeback.
The win is Ole Miss's 14th of the season.
Georgia drops to 22-10 with the loss.
games.context: Ole Miss advances to the next round of the SEC tournament.

games.headline: Charlotte's second-half explosion buries Tulane
games.brief: After a low-scoring first half, Charlotte completely took over in the final 20 minutes to eliminate Tulane. The 49ers' 56-point second-half outburst was one of the most efficient offensive displays of the tournament, turning a close game into a comfortable win.
bullets: Charlotte scored 56 points in the second half after only scoring 18 in the first.
Tulane led 20-18 at the half.
Both teams now sit with 18-15 and 16-16 records respectively.
Charlotte advances in the American Conference Championship.
games.context: Charlotte advances to the American Conference quarterfinals.

games.headline: San Diego State shuts down Colorado State in Las Vegas
games.brief: San Diego State's suffocating defense was on full display as they handled Colorado State in the Mountain West quarterfinals. The Aztecs jumped out to a 12-point halftime lead and relied on their veteran poise to weather several Rams rallies in the second half.
bullets: Miles Byrd led the Aztecs with 12 points and crucial defensive plays.
San Diego State outscored the Rams 39-27 in the first half.
Colorado State falls to 21-12 on the season.
The Aztecs move to 21-10 and continue their hunt for a conference title.
games.context: San Diego State advances to the Mountain West semifinals.

games.headline: UCLA pulls away late to dismiss Rutgers from Big Ten tourney
games.brief: In a matchup between two physical squads, UCLA's depth and second-half execution proved to be the deciding factor. The Bruins steadily extended their six-point halftime lead, frustrating the Scarlet Knights with a high-pressure defense that forced several key scoring droughts.
bullets: UCLA outscored Rutgers 42-35 in the second half.
The Bruins improved to 22-10 overall.
Rutgers struggled from the field, hitting under 40% of their shots.
UCLA led for over 35 minutes of game time.
games.context: UCLA advances to the Big Ten quarterfinals.

games.headline: Halaifonua's double-double fuels Georgetown upset of Villanova
games.brief: Georgetown pulled off one of the biggest surprises of the Big East tournament, dismantling a highly-favored Villanova team. Led by Julius Halaifonua, the Hoyas controlled the paint and outworked the Wildcats on both ends of the floor to secure a dominant 14-point victory.
bullets: Julius Halaifonua posted 21 points and 10 rebounds.
Georgetown led 35-31 at the half and pulled away with a 43-point second half.
Villanova dropped to 24-8 with the shocking loss.
The Hoyas' bench outscored Villanova's reserves 28-12.
games.context: Georgetown advances to the Big East semifinals after stunning the No. 2 seed.

games.headline: North Texas holds off FAU in back-and-forth thriller
games.brief: North Texas used a balanced scoring attack and physical defense to survive a late charge from Florida Atlantic. In a game that was tied multiple times in the closing minutes, the Mean Green's ability to secure key offensive rebounds proved to be the difference maker.
bullets: North Texas outscored FAU 40-40 in the second half after a 4-point halftime lead.
The Mean Green improved to 19-13 on the season.
FAU's loss likely places them in the NIT conversation.
The game featured 15 lead changes.
games.context: North Texas advances in the American Conference Championship.

games.headline: Oklahoma cruises past Texas A&M in dominant SEC showing
games.brief: Oklahoma left little doubt in their SEC tournament matchup, blowing out Texas A&M from the start. The Sooners' offense was clicking on all cylinders, building a 22-point halftime lead that allowed them to coast through the second half and conserve energy for the next round.
bullets: Oklahoma led 49-27 at the break.
The Sooners shot over 50% from the field for the game.
Texas A&M struggled offensively, shooting just 36% in the first half.
Oklahoma improves to 19-14 as they push for a tournament bid.
games.context: Oklahoma advances to the SEC quarterfinals.

games.headline: Utah Tech survives second-half scare from Abilene Christian
games.brief: Utah Tech used a massive 18-point halftime lead to barely withstand a furious comeback attempt from Abilene Christian. The Wildcats outscored the Trailblazers by 12 in the second half, but Utah Tech's early dominance was just enough to preserve the win in Las Vegas.
bullets: Utah Tech led 46-28 at the half.
Abilene Christian mounted a 46-point second-half rally that fell just short.
The win brings Utah Tech to 19-14 overall.
The Trailblazers hit 12 three-pointers in the contest.
games.context: Utah Tech advances to the WAC semifinals.

games.headline: Fullerton's hot start sinks UC Davis in Big West quarterfinals
games.brief: Cal State Fullerton used a balanced scoring effort and a fast start to eliminate UC Davis. The Titans' ability to penetrate the paint and get to the free-throw line kept the Aggies at bay for most of the night, despite a late 44-point second-half surge from Davis.
bullets: Cal State Fullerton led 38-26 at the half.
UC Davis outscored the Titans in the second half but couldn't overcome the deficit.
Fullerton improves to 18-15 and moves on to the semifinals.
The Titans finished with a 24-11 advantage in free throws made.
games.context: Cal State Fullerton advances to the Big West semifinals.

games.headline: New Mexico overpowers San Jose State in high-scoring finale
games.brief: New Mexico closed out the night in Las Vegas with an offensive masterclass, putting up 93 points to end San Jose State's season. The Lobos' high-tempo offense was too much for the Spartans to contain, as New Mexico scored at will both in transition and in the half-court.
bullets: New Mexico scored 50 points in the second half to pull away.
The Lobos improved to 23-9 on the year.
San Jose State's 77-point effort wasn't enough against New Mexico's efficient shooting.
The win secures a 23-win season for the Lobos.
games.context: New Mexico advances to the Mountain West semifinals.
